name: Wastelander of Banditry Desert
description: Increases Imaginary DMG by 10%. When dealing DMG to debuffed enemy targets, the wearer has their CRIT Rate increased by 10%. And when they deal DMG to Imprisoned enemy targets, their CRIT DMG increases by 20%.
